items.title: Final: Kings 91, Clippers 85. Keaton Wagler scored 7 points in his Clippers debut. Cam Christie led with 15 points and 8 rebounds. Sean Pedulla and Nick Martinelli each had 11 off the bench. Baba Miller scored 12. Clippers next play on Sunday against Utah.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Final: Kings 91, Clippers 85. Keaton Wagler scored 7 points in his Clippers debut. Cam Christie led with 15 points and 8 rebounds. Sean Pedulla and Nick Martinelli each had 11 off the bench. Baba Miller scored 12. Clippers next play on Sunday against Utah.

items.title: Cam Christie has surpassed Chris Kaman for 3rd on the Clippers’ all-time Summer League scoring list.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Cam Christie has surpassed Chris Kaman for 3rd on the Clippers’ all-time Summer League scoring list.

items.title: Clippers trail Kings 70-58 after three. Clippers are shooting 27% for the game. They’ve attempted just 39 shots in 30 minutes. Cam Christie leads the team with 13 points and 6 rebounds.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Clippers trail Kings 70-58 after three. Clippers are shooting 27% for the game. They’ve attempted just 39 shots in 30 minutes. Cam Christie leads the team with 13 points and 6 rebounds.

items.title: Cam Christie has surpassed Al Thornton for 4th on the Clippers’ all-time Summer League scoring list.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Cam Christie has surpassed Al Thornton for 4th on the Clippers’ all-time Summer League scoring list.

items.title: Halftime: Kings 44, Clippers 41. Cam Christie has 11 points and 5 rebounds, and Keaton Wagler got his first points as a Clipper on a 3-pointer. Clippers shooting 36% overall. Kings at 35%. Kings have doubled up the Clippers in FGA (44-22). A real Summer League vibe for this one.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Halftime: Kings 44, Clippers 41. Cam Christie has 11 points and 5 rebounds, and Keaton Wagler got his first points as a Clipper on a 3-pointer. Clippers shooting 36% overall. Kings at 35%. Kings have doubled up the Clippers in FGA (44-22). A real Summer League vibe for this one.

items.title: Clippers lead Kings 22-20 after one. Cam Christie leads all scorers with 9 points and has 4 rebounds. Kobe Sanders with 2 points, Nick Martinelli has 6. Keaton Wagler hasn’t scored so far in 6 minutes but does have a rebound and an assist.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Clippers lead Kings 22-20 after one. Cam Christie leads all scorers with 9 points and has 4 rebounds. Kobe Sanders with 2 points, Nick Martinelli has 6. Keaton Wagler hasn’t scored so far in 6 minutes but does have a rebound and an assist.

items.title: The LA Clippers have released their 2026 Las Vegas Summer League roster. It will feature Keaton Wagler, Kobe Sanders, Baba Miller, Cam Christie, Nick Martinelli, and Sean Medulla, among others.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: The LA Clippers have released their 2026 Las Vegas Summer League roster. It will feature Keaton Wagler, Kobe Sanders, Baba Miller, Cam Christie, Nick Martinelli, and Sean Medulla, among others.

items.title: Cam Christie
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
Cam Christie 

I mentioned he had a guarantee date in his contract

It has been pushed to July 20

Four days before his 21st birthday 

And more pertinently: one day after summer league wraps
